summary: RBAC Frontend Migration Testing - Verified usePermissions hook integration. Admin user (gussdub@gmail.com) has full access to all modules. Tested Dashboard, Interventions, Prévention, Personnel, and Gestion des Actifs modules.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ usePermissions hook correctly integrated in GestionInterventions.jsx - tabs are conditional based on RBAC
✅ Dashboard.jsx uses hasTabAction and hasModuleAction for section visibility
✅ CalendrierInspections.jsx uses hasTabAction for creating inspections permission
✅ ParametresInventairesVehicules.jsx uses hasTabAction for access control
✅ InspectionComponents.jsx uses hasTabAction for delete permission
✅ Admin user sees all conditional tabs: Cartes d'appel, Conformité DSI, Historique, Paramètres
✅ Fausses alarmes tab not visible - correct behavior (requires fausses_alarmes_config.actif AND permission)
✅ Broadcast button visible for admin on Dashboard (canBroadcast = hasModuleAction('parametres', 'modifier'))
✅ Admin sections visible: Vue Générale du Service, Flux d'activité système, Personnes absentes
context_for_next_testing_agent: RBAC frontend migration verified. usePermissions hook is properly integrated across all tested components. Admin user has full access (is_full_access: true). The following modules were tested and working: Dashboard (broadcast button, admin sections), Interventions (conditional tabs based on permissions), Prévention (all tabs visible), Personnel (full CRUD), Gestion des Actifs (all tabs visible). The 'Fausses alarmes' tab in Interventions is not visible because faussesAlarmesActif setting is false in the tenant configuration.

features_verified: Admin sections visible (Vue Générale du Service)
Tab 'Paramètres' visible (data-testid=tab-parametres) - RBAC conditional for admin
Filter options (Tous, Incendie, Alerte Santé) working
interventions.notes: Fausses alarmes tab not visible - expected because fausse_alarme_config.actif is false

features_verified: All tabs visible: Tableau de bord, Bâtiments, À valider, Préventionnistes, Planification, Non-conformités, Rapports, Plans, Paramètres
Statistics displayed: 16 bâtiments, 7 inspections, 1 NC ouverte, 100% conformité
Admin features visible: Nouveau pompier button
Action buttons per employee (edit, delete, calendar)
All tabs visible: Véhicules, Approvisionnement en Eau, Matériel & Équipements, Gestion EPI, Paramètres
Vehicle card displayed with full details
Admin actions: Modifier, Fiche de vie, Inventaire, Supprimer

functions_tested: hasModuleAction() - used in Dashboard for broadcast permission
hasTabAction() - used in GestionInterventions for conditional tabs
usePermissions_hook.admin_behavior: Returns is_full_access: true, granting access to all features

files_verified: ParametresInventairesVehicules.jsx - Access control for inventory settings
